sourcesContent:
// File: client/src/pages/Emergency.js import React from 'react'; const Emergency = () => { const emergencyResources = [ { name: 'National Suicide Prevention Lifeline', number: '1-800-273-8255', description: '24/7 free and confidential support for people in distress', available: '24/7', link: 'https://suicidepreventionlifeline.org' }, { name: 'Crisis Text Line', number: 'Text HOME to 741741', description: 'Free, 24/7 crisis support via text message', available: '24/7', link: 'https://www.crisistextline.org' }, { name: 'SAMHSA Treatment Referral Hotline', number: '1-877-726-4727', description: 'General information on mental health and treatment options', available: '24/7', link: 'https://www.samhsa.gov/find-help/national-helpline' }, { name: 'National Domestic Violence Hotline', number: '1-800-799-7233', description: 'Support for domestic violence situations', available: '24/7', link: 'https://www.thehotline.org' }, { name: 'Trevor Project (LGBTQ Crisis Support)', number: '1-866-488-7386', description: 'Crisis intervention and suicide prevention for LGBTQ youth', available: '24/7', link: 'https://www.thetrevorproject.org' }, { name: 'Veterans Crisis Line', number: '1-800-273-8255 (Press 1)', description: 'Support for veterans in crisis', available: '24/7', link: 'https://www.veteranscrisisline.net' } ]; const copingStrategies = [ { title: 'Grounding Techniques', description: 'Focus on your senses to stay present. Name 5 things you can see, 4 things you can feel, 3 things you can hear, 2 things you can smell, and 1 thing you can taste.' }, { title: 'Breathing Exercises', description: 'Try the 4-7-8 method: Breathe in for 4 seconds, hold for 7 seconds, exhale for 8 seconds. Repeat several times.' }, { title: 'Reach Out', description: 'Contact a trusted friend, family member, or mental health professional. You don\'t have to go through this alone.' }, { title: 'Safe Environment', description: 'Move to a safe, comfortable space. Remove yourself from triggering situations if possible.' } ]; return (

Emergency Support

Immediate help and resources when you need it most

{/* Emergency Alert */}

If you're in immediate danger

Please call 911 or go to your nearest emergency room.

{/* Emergency Resources */}

Crisis Hotlines

{emergencyResources.map((resource) => (

{resource.name}

{resource.number}

{resource.description}

{resource.available} Visit website
))}
{/* Coping Strategies */}

Immediate Coping Strategies

{copingStrategies.map((strategy, index) => (

{strategy.title}

{strategy.description}

))}
{/* Safety Plan */}

Create a Safety Plan

A safety plan can help you navigate difficult moments. Consider preparing:

  • Emergency contacts to reach out to
  • Comforting activities you can do alone
  • Places you can go to feel safe
  • Professional resources you can contact
  • Reasons to live or things to look forward to
); }; export default Emergency;
